title: Trump Revels in Threats to Commit War Crimes in Iran
summary_full: The president said he would bomb Iran “back to the Stone Ages.” Until this administration, American leaders had insisted they were trying to follow international law in war.
summary_public: The president said he would bomb Iran “back to the Stone Ages.” Until this administration, American leaders had insisted they were trying to follow international law in war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump Revels in Threats to Commit War Crimes in Iran
